channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: Meilleurs PC portables étudiants en 2026 : MacBook Air, Zenbook, Chromebook… nos modèles recommandés
item.description: L’ordinateur portable est le compagnon indispensable de l’étudiant moderne. Que ce soit pour prendre des notes en cours ou suivre des cours en visio, un laptop est indispensable pour accompagner des études supérieures. Nous avons testé et rassemblé ici les meilleurs PC portables pour étudiants.

item.title: This bold FPS is the Kane & Lynch 2 successor I've been waiting for since the Xbox 360 days
item.description: This indie shooter is the Kane & Lynch 2 successor I've been waiting for.

item.title: SpaceX is reportedly planning to build its own natural gas pipeline in Texas
item.description: The 8-mile pipeline would bring fuel for Starship to the company's Starbase.

item.title: Apple Vision Pro exec is reportedly leaving for OpenAI
item.description: Paul Meade, the Apple vice president in charge of the Vision Pro headset, is reportedly leaving the company to join OpenAI’s hardware team.

item.title: Ayaneo's new horizontal handheld is an even better remake of the Game Boy Micro
item.description: The Pocket Micro 2 has a larger battery, improved controls and even a 3.5mm headphone jack.

item.title: Meta is pushing for social media exclusions in new child safety regulation
item.description: New state legislation could lead to millions in fines for social media companies.

item.title: Apple just raised prices, but we found 11 Prime Day Apple deals that are still live
item.description: The best lingering Prime Day Apple deals include record lows on the Apple Watch Series 11. It's also your last chance to buy MacBooks before a price increase.

item.title: ‘Swept up in its own braggadocio’: this Final gaming headset I tested sounds good for its price, and its battery should last you up to a week — but on features, it overpromises and underdelivers
item.description: Final’s affordable gaming headset offers an epic battery life and decent enough sound — but during testing, I found its claim to offer ‘immersive, spatial audio’ to be pretty overblown.

item.title: 'We want to be the operating system for physical operations': How Samsara wants to help even the most traditional companies adopt AI
item.description: We hear from Samsara about its plans to get manual operations firms of all kinds up to speed with AI.

item.title: Test Kindle Scribe Colorsoft : la liseuse XXL d’Amazon voit la vie en couleurs, mais manque d’éclat
item.description: Amazon sort enfin en France sa liseuse la plus complète, la Kindle Scribe Colorsoft. Nous avons essayé cette liseuse couleur avec stylet qui permet de lire et annoter ses romans, BD, ou encore organiser des notes manuscrites.

item.title: Prime Day is over, but Bose Ultra Open Earbuds are still $100 off at Amazon
item.description: The Bose Ultra Open earbuds are still on sale at Amazon for $199, down from the normal price of $229. That's a 33% discount.

item.title: iPhone 18 Pro et Pro Max : date de sortie, prix, couleurs… tout savoir sur le prochain smartphone d’Apple
item.description: Les iPhone 18 Pro et Pro Max, attendus pour septembre 2026, font l'objet de nombreuses rumeurs. Voici donc notre résumé exhaustif et compact des bruits de couloir les plus pertinents à nos yeux.

item.title: We found 15+ Prime Day headphones deals still available at Amazon: Shop Bose, Sony, and Marshall
item.description: Prime Day ends tonight. Here are the best headphone and earbud deals you can still buy, plus where to find the AirPods Max 2 in stock.

item.title: Avis aux sportifs, ces écouteurs ouverts sont très abordables pendant les soldes d’été
item.description: Avec les Ear (open), Nothing livre des écouteurs confortables pour la pratique du sport et Boulanger baisse leur prix à 70,06 euros durant les soldes d'été.

item.title: 'We don’t believe this kind of government access process should become the long-term default': OpenAI unveils big GPT-5.6 upgrades for ChatGPT, but you can't use them yet
item.description: As the US government wants to test OpenAI's new models itself, users won't be getting access to GPT-5.6 for the time being.

item.title: The Kindle app for iOS has features your aging Kindle doesn't
item.description: Amazon's Kindle AI features help you read beyond the lines, so long as you have the right ereader.

item.title: We found the best Prime Day earbuds deals that are still live: Save on Apple, Bose, and Nothing buds
item.description: We've rounded up the best earbud deals you can grab after Prime Day, including the AirPods Pro 3 for $179.
